race.comment: The babies kick us off. The well-related FINAL CRUSADE (4) (full to 4xListed winner and 2xG2 placed Outback Barbie) was heavily supported at Toowoomba last time out but just ran into one better on that occasion. Gets the services of gun hoop Maloney in the irons and where there's smoke there's fire. Rates the testing material. PRIVATE MAX (7) wasn't too far away at the Sunny Coast when facing the starter for the first time and will have derived a stack of benefit from that race day experience. Gets in well at the weights with the 2kg claim and looms as the main danger. WRITTEN ACLAIM (2) didn't measure up in G3 company at the latest effort but will appreciate the drop back in grade here. Top-three credentials. EVER SO READY (3) will be at peak fitness for this and may earn some minor money. ADORA DJON'S (12) best of the rest while fresh.
